data.title: LayerZero wins Stargate takeover with 94% DAO approval in rare $120 million deal
data.description:

Stargate Finance DAO approved the deal with an overwhelming majority. The acquisition will see LayerZero and Stargate merge under one project, with ZRO becoming the official token for the two cross-chain protocols. 94% of Stargate Finance […]

data.title: Bitcoin Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Bitcoin's price falls below $113,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) could reach $1.297 billion. Conversely, if Bitcoin surpasses $116,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on these exchanges could amount to $423 million.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not display the exact number of contracts pending liquidation or their precise value. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the chart illustrates the potential impact on the market when the asset price reaches certain levels. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests a stronger reaction due to liquidity waves when the price hits that point.

data.title: ChatGPT-5 sets XRP price for end of 2025 if SEC approves spot ETF in October
data.description:
Following the conclusion of the Ripple and Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) case, attention has shifted to the regulator regarding the possible approval of a spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF). This comes at a critical October window when the SEC is expected to decide on multiple applications for the product. To this end, the regulator is reviewing filings from several leading issuers, including Grayscale, 21Shares, Bitwise, Canary Capital, WisdomTree, Franklin Templeton, and CoinShares.  Deadlines for these applications fall between October 18 and October 25, 2025, making the week a decisive moment for XRP’s market trajectory
source: https://finbold.com/chatgpt-5-sets-xrp-price-for-end-of-2025-if-sec-approves-spot-etf-in-october/

data.title: Chainlink Price Eyes $34 As Derivatives-Driven Rally Picks Up Pace
data.description:
Key Insights: Chainlink price surged over 7% weekly while most altcoins remained flat, showing independent strength. Derivatives funding rate flipped from -0. 0092% to +0. 012%, with open interest rising to $1
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/24/chainlink-price-eyes-34-as-derivatives-driven-rally-picks-up-pace-2/

data.title: Ethereum Gaming Network XAI Sues Elon Musk’s xAI Over Trademark Infringement
data.description:
Ex Populus, the Delaware corporation behind Ethereum's blockchain-powered gaming network Xai, has filed a federal trademark infringement lawsuit against Elon Musk's artificial intelligence company xAI over marketplace confusion between Ex Populus's XAI trademark and Musk's xAI company.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethereum-gaming-network-xai-sues-elon-musks-xai-over-trademark-infringement/

data.title: Ethereum Price Still Set for $5,400 as One Key Group Buys the Dip
data.description:
Key Insights: Ethereum price jumped 2% in 24 hours, bouncing off the $4,000 support, defying broader market weakness. Whales resumed buying after open interest and funding rates cooled off, reducing overleveraged risk. On-chain data shows low exchange reserves, indicating less sell pressure and more room for upside toward the $5,400 analyst target
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/24/ethereum-price-still-set-for-5400-as-one-key-group-buys-the-dip-2/

data.title: Here’s Why Jerome Powell’s Jackson Hole Speech Could Make or Mar Crypto Market
data.description:
Jerome Powell’s Jackson Hole speech is scheduled for 4 PM CET, is set to draw global market focus. Market traders are pricing in a 70%–85% chance of a September interest rate cut. Crypto traders warned of 7%–15% downside risk if no cuts are signaled following the speech
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/24/heres-why-jerome-powells-jackson-hole-speech-could-make-or-mar-crypto-market/

data.title: Ethereum Price Faces Key Resistance As US Government Adds $281M ETH
data.description:
Key Insights: Ethereum price posted gains of over 70% in the last quarter. Support between $4,500 and $4,700 was decisive for the next move. US government wallets held more than $281 million in ETH. Ethereum recorded its best quarter in more than three years
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/24/ethereum-price-faces-key-resistance-as-us-government-adds-281m-eth-2/
